results.title: ToolSense | Cloud-Based Hospitality Asset & Maintenance Management
results.content:
ToolSense is a comprehensive asset operations and maintenance management platform that helps hospitality teams streamline work orders, maintenance, inspections and asset tracking across buildings, equipment and facilities, improving uptime and operational efficiency. With mobile QR code reporting, IoT connectivity and automated workflows, staff can report issues in real time and track the full lifecycle of assets, reducing downtime and operational cost. ToolSense is ideal for hotels, resorts, multi‑site hospitality groups and facility management teams that need centralized control over equipment, repairs and safety inspections. Its cloud‑based system works with smartphones and integrates with existing enterprise software, IoT sensors and digital workflows, enabling seamless data exchange, [...] and digital workflows, enabling seamless data exchange, analytics and reporting without disrupting current operations. ToolSense’s intuitive mobile and web apps empower frontline staff to act quickly and managers to make data‑driven decisions while keeping assets in optimal condition. [...] verified

Technical specifications

The ToolSense onboarding process is structured to ensure rapid adoption and operational efficiency. We begin with a discovery session to assess your property’s assets, maintenance workflows, and reporting needs. The platform is then configured, IoT sensors and mobile QR codes are set up, and integrations with existing systems are implemented. Staff receive guided training on mobile and web applications, workflows, and reporting dashboards, with ongoing support provided to ensure seamless adoption and immediate improvements in maintenance efficiency and asset management.

results.title: What Is ToolSense? Learn About Advantages and Use Cases | ToolSense
results.content:
The Austrian IoT company offers an easy-to-use Asset Operations Platform that can be implemented in many different industries and companies all over the world. Especially, facility services companies and construction businesses that utilise a vast array of different machines and assets can profit from an end-to-end solution like ToolSense. It allows for effortless equipment, asset or vehicle tracking, gives an overview of important numbers in a single platform, and works on all types of machines regardless of their manufacturer. By digitising the workplace and utilising machine and resource management software and IoT hardware, companies can easily save both time and money through automation. If that process still seems daunting, ToolSense is here to make the leap into the digital [...] ## Conclusion

ToolSense, as an independent and comprehensive IoT solution, is a practical tool for many companies that are looking to digitalise their workflow. Regardless of sector, asset-intensive businesses can really benefit from ToolSense IoT and software solution. It will help solve the operational disconnect and aid in the company’s digital transformation. By digitalising the process, companies can work more efficiently and profitably. [...] ToolSense keeps important information, dates and numbers in one place and makes it accessible to every department involved in the process. Not only do businesses profit from using ToolSense, but having an organised and easy workflow will also contribute to an enjoyable work experience for every employee. Clever IoT solutions like ToolSense can help modernise and digitalise businesses and pave the way for a profitable future.

results.title: ToolSense: Details, Reviews, Pricing, & Features | CheckThat.ai
results.content:
## ToolSense TL;DR

ToolSense provides cloud-based asset management software that replaces manual, paper-based tracking with centralized digital systems combining IoT sensors and QR code scanning. The platform serves mid-market to enterprise organizations across construction, manufacturing, facility management, and other asset-intensive industries—managing equipment portfolios of 5,000+ assets. Its key differentiator is the hybrid tracking approach that balances sophisticated automation with accessible field operations, while offering integrated workflows spanning maintenance scheduling, safety compliance, and inventory management in a single platform.

## ToolSense Company Overview [...] ## ToolSense Company Overview

ToolSense launched in 2017 from Austria to replace spreadsheets and paperwork with centralized digital asset tracking. CEO Alexander Manafi leads the company, which has raised $12 million across multiple funding rounds—most recently an €8 million Series A in November 2025 led by PwC's Industrial Internet of Things venture arm.

The platform addresses equipment downtime, manual process elimination, and compliance management across asset-intensive operations. Seven years in market with sustained venture backing signals operational stability beyond typical startup volatility. [...] ## ToolSense Competitive Landscape

ToolSense competes against Samsara, Fleetio, Geotab, Verizon Connect, and TrackoBit in the asset tracking market.

The hybrid IoT + QR code architecture positions between hardware-intensive enterprise systems (Samsara, Geotab, Verizon Connect requiring significant infrastructure) and basic asset registers lacking sensor integration. This mid-complexity approach provides automation without demanding full hardware commitments.

Integrated workflow management spanning maintenance, safety inspections, inventory, and analytics offers broader operational scope than pure location tracking or fleet-specific tools like Fleetio. The platform addresses full lifecycle from issue identification through resolution and maintenance scheduling.

results.title: About the FM Operations Platform | ToolSense
results.content:
## Customer testimonial

## FAQ

ToolSense is the FM Operations Platform – one IoT- and AI-powered platform that replaces the eight disconnected tools (paper, WhatsApp, Excel, Microsoft Forms, CMMS, CAFM, fleet trackers, robotics dashboards) facility management teams have been stitching together.

Multi-site facility management operators, lean teams running 50+ machines, cleaning equipment OEMs, and global operators with the scale and operational maturity to make a platform decision. Customers include for example ISS, Compass Group, JLL, and Atalian on the FM operator side, and Tennant and i-team on the OEM side.

Vienna, Austria – with 50+ employees serving 200+ customers across 30+ countries. [...] # The FM Operations Platform built around the humans who keep buildings running

ToolSense is the FM Operations Platform: one place for every asset, every workflow, every robot, and every human in facility management. We replace paper, WhatsApp, Excel, and the eight disconnected tools FM teams have been stitching together – with one IoT- and AI-powered platform that the frontline actually uses and the C-suite actually trusts.

Designed for the Frontline – by people who know the work.

Alexander Manafi, Beni, and Ross – co-founders of ToolSense, the FM operations platform headquartered in Vienna.

## How ToolSense started [...] Alexander Manafi, Benjamin Petterle, and Rostyslav Yavorskyi co-founded ToolSense in 2017 while studying in Vienna, after hearing that expensive power tools were stolen from Hilti construction sites.

GRO Capital, matterwave ventures, PwC Germany, part of the PlanRadar Founders invested in ToolSense to build the FM Operations Platform.

Nine years of deep IoT integration with the world's major equipment OEMs. IoT isn't a feature on top of the platform – it's the spine inside it. That's the unfair advantage no dashboard can replicate.

The FM Operations Platform that helps facility management teams work smarter, not harder.

results.title: Honest ToolSense Review: Is ToolSense a Good CMMS?
results.content:
Features like asset creation, work order generation and location setup are easy to find and use. With just a few clicks, users can log maintenance issues, assign work orders and link assets to specific sites. The drag-and-drop functionality and logical layout make navigating through the system feel smooth. Updating a work order — whether changing status, adding notes or attaching images—is quick and can be done on both desktop and mobile. Searching for existing work orders is equally efficient, with filters for status, priority, date, technician and location making it simple to locate exactly what you need. 

Overall, ToolSense strikes a solid balance between simplicity and depth, making it accessible for everyday users while still offering the functionality maintenance teams expect. [...] Coast App Logo

Coast App Logo

# Honest ToolSense Review: Is ToolSense a Good CMMS?

Toolsense review

Why worry when you can Coast?

Vienna, Austria-headquartered ToolSense is built with a strong emphasis on heavy equipment, making it an excellent choice for construction, manufacturing or facilities management businesses that depend on large fleets of machinery. Simply upload your asset inventory list, attach unique QR codes or IoT sensors, and the software tracks location, usage, runtime and battery levels — all in real time. Spot a problem? Just scan a code, snap a photo and log a service ticket instantly. Create automatic maintenance schedules and inspections (like ladder checks) with intuitive rules and forms. [...] Toolsense mobileToolSense offers a mobile app designed with simplicity in mind. For maintenance teams who may not be especially tech-savvy, the app’s clean layout and intuitive navigation are a plus. The interface features large buttons, logical menus and minimal clutter, which makes it less intimidating for users who aren’t used to smartphones or software systems. Core actions like scanning a QR code, submitting an issue or checking off a task are front and center, requiring just a few taps.

results.content:
# ToolSense
FM Operations Platform - All Equipment, Robots & Workflows in One Place
Software Development • Vienna, Vienna • 5,053 followers • 51-200 employees

## Overview
ToolSense is the FM Operations Platform that replaces paper, Excel, and WhatsApp with one IoT- and AI-powered system. Equipment, robotics, maintenance, field service, inspections, vehicles, quality management, audits, and frontline task documentation - all in one place. 20+ OEM integrations. Real-time IoT. Built-in workflow automation. Full visibility across every site, asset, and country. Trusted by 200+ customers in 30+ countries, including ISS, COMPASS, Dussmann, Atalian, COOR, i-team, and Tennant. Learn more at toolsense.io

results.title: ToolSense | The FM Operations Platform
results.content:
White-label IoT and telematics platform

## Why ToolSense

### Replace your fragmented tools with one platform

Eight tools for one job is too many. ToolSense brings your CMMS, CAFM, robotics dashboards, fleet trackers, paper checklists, Microsoft Forms, Excel and WhatsApp under one roof.

### Built for the frontline

No app store, no training day, no language barrier. Just scan the QR code on the machine on whatever phone is already in the pocket.

### Pre-loaded, not empty

Our FM Machine Database ships with master data for every major FM equipment brand. Your assets show up the day you log in. No 6-month onboarding project.

### AI-powered, IoT-connected [...] ### AI-powered, IoT-connected

Stop running operations on gut feel. ToolSense pulls live data from 50,000+ assets across the field, so every decision from a maintenance call to a budget review is backed by what's actually happening on the ground through data, technology, and real-time insights.

### Connect your assets.

Connect machines via IoT or OEM cloud, stick a QR code on the rest. However your equipment is set up today, we'll meet it where it is.

### Run your workflows.

Maintenance, inspections, audits, monitor robot fleets, vehicles: the workflows your team runs every day, finally in one system.

### See your operations live.

From a technician on site to the COO in the boardroom, everyone sees the same live picture of what's happening. [...] Every machine, tool and piece of equipment
